outfit.title: Capri Comeback
outfit.description:
Capri leggings · longline blazer · fitted crop top · platform sneakers
capri leggings are controversial but they are undeniably back and both gen z and millennials are wearing them which means this trend has real legs no pun intended. the longline blazer over capris combo keeps it elevated and takes the look from gym to street instantly.
